nasb.text: It is not what enters into the mouth that defiles the man, but what proceeds out of the mouth, this defiles the man.”

esv.text: it is not what goes into the mouth that defiles a person, but what comes out of the mouth; this defiles a person.”

cnv.text: 進到口裡的不能使人污穢，只有從口裡出來的，才能使人污穢。”

ccb.text: 入口的东西不会使人污秽，从口中出来的才会使人污秽。”

csbs.text: 不是进到口里的使人污秽；而是从口里出来的，这才使人污秽。”
